title: EU AI Act — High-risk system classification guidelines published
summary: European Commission published final guidelines on what constitutes a high-risk AI system under Article 6. Systems used in employment and credit decisions are explicitly included.

title: FTC finalises rule on AI-generated endorsements and testimonials
summary: FTC final rule requires disclosure when AI generates reviews or testimonials. Enforcement begins 90 days after publication. Penalties up to $50,000 per violation.

title: UK ICO updates guidance on automated decision-making under UK GDPR
summary: Updated guidance clarifies when organisations must provide human review for automated decisions. Applies to any decision producing legal or similarly significant effects.

title: California AB-2013: Training data transparency for AI products (effective Jan 2027)
summary: Signed into law. Requires AI developers to publish summary of training data used. Applies to products used by California consumers.

title: NIST AI RMF v2.0 released — new guidance on AI audit trails
summary: Non-binding but widely referenced. New section on documenting AI model decisions for audit purposes. Expected to influence enterprise procurement requirements.

title: Minor update to GDPR cookie consent template — no material change
summary: Template wording update only. No change to consent requirements. Low relevance for most products.
